description: Change-request acknowledgement when classifier can't confidently predict a timeline (omits the optional clause)

expected.subject: Your change request is in the queue
expected.body:
Hi Jordan,

Got it: redesign the homepage hero section.

I'll work on this.

You have 1 change request left for this month. You can
retract this request from your dashboard any time before I start
working on it.

— Cowork (your ModuForge ops assistant)
